# NovaCart

NovaCart is a portfolio-ready multi-merchant ecommerce website builder. It demonstrates a public SaaS marketing site, generated merchant storefronts, a protected merchant operations dashboard, demo-safe checkout, inventory tracking, promotions, support tickets, refund queues, and analytics.

## Core Pages

- Platform overview: /
- Features: /features
- Templates: /templates
- Pricing: /pricing
- Fashion storefront demo: /store/demo-fashion
- Sports storefront demo: /store/demo-sports
- Home goods storefront demo: /store/demo-home
- Minimal boutique storefront demo: /store/demo-boutique

## Technical Architecture

- Frontend: Vue 3, Vite, Vue Router, Pinia, Axios, custom responsive CSS
- Backend: Java 21, Spring Boot 4, Spring Data JPA, Spring Security, JWT, REST JSON APIs
- Database: MySQL at runtime, H2 for tests
- Demo safety: checkout and generated storefront orders are mock/demo-safe and do not process real payments

## Useful Documentation

- README.md
- docs/ARCHITECTURE.md
- docs/API.md
- docs/PRODUCT_REQUIREMENTS.md
